issues.description: Condition 'HasRestingDon' checks for resting DON!! cards. Card text says '8 or more DON!! cards on your field' (attached DON!!), which requires 'HasAttachedDon' condition instead.

Action 'Rest' is incorrect. Card text says 'set up to 1 of your purple {Straw Hat Crew} type Characters... as active', meaning set to active state. Should use 'GiveKeyword' with keyword 'Active' or equivalent active-setting action, not 'Rest' (which sets to resting).
Target is missing type filter. Card specifies 'purple {Straw Hat Crew} type Characters', but DSL only filters by maxPower. Must add type/color restrictions to scope.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] If you have 8 or more DON!! cards on your field, set up to 1 of your purple {Straw Hat Crew} type Characters with 6000 power or less as active.
